allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const s = z.discriminatedUnion\('grant_type', [z.object\({grant_type: z.literal\('authorization_code'\), code: z.string\(\)}\), z.object\({grant_type: z.literal\('refresh_token'\), refresh_token: z.string\(\)}\)]\); console.log\('OK:', s.parse\({grant_type: 'authorization_code', code: 'test'}\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const s = z.literal\('code', { message: 'must be code'}\); console.log\('OK:', s.parse\('code'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const s = z.record\(z.unknown\(\)\); console.log\('OK:', s.parse\({a: 1}\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const s = z.record\(z.string\(\), z.unknown\(\)\); console.log\('OK:', s.parse\({a: 1}\)\)")
